candidates.title: Modern Monochrome Logo Design
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: I need a fresh brand mark that feels distinctly modern, sticks to a clean monochrome palette, and relies on crisp geometric shapes rather than illustrations or ornate flourishes. The end result should work just as well reversed out on dark backgrounds as it does in black on white, scale cleanly from social-media avatar size to large signage, and arrive to me in fully editable vector format (AI or SVG) alongside high-resolution PNGs. I have not locked down any exact shape combinations, so you’re welcome to experiment with negative space, symmetry, or subtle line-weight variations so long as the overall look remains contemporary and uncluttered. Bold yet simple shapes that can be recognized instantly are the priority; gradients, vintage treatments, or multicolored palettes are out of scope for this brief. Please share a quick outline of your concept approach, a couple of relevant logo samp

candidates.title: Visual Identity Designer for Wellbeing Startup
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price What we need We are commissioning the creative core of our visual identity. We build the full brand manual and all applications in-house, so this engagement is focused. You deliver: - A primary wordmark - A compact brand mark (an abstract icon or monogram that works square, for app icon, favicon, and social avatar) - A defined lockup (wordmark and brand mark combined) - Variants: monochrome and dark mode - An imagery concept with two to three worked examples - A colour system recommendation that supports product-level colour coding - A typeface recommendation (display and body) with multilingual glyph coverage - Core usage specs (clear space, minimum size, monochrome) Constraints that matter to us: - Wordmark-led, with a compact brand mark for small and square formats. The mark must be abstract and must not hint at any single product's subject, because it carries the

candidates.title: Iconic Logo Creation for YWYW Digital Platform
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: Need a premium, iconic logo design for a new digital platform called YWYW (Your Will Your Way). IMPORTANT: We do NOT want a logo based on the initials YWYW. Please do NOT create: * Lettermarks * Monograms * Y + W combinations * Hidden initials * Generic finance logos * Generic legal logos * Generic estate planning logos Avoid completely: * Shields * Houses * Trees * Family silhouettes * Hearts * Infinity symbols * Locks * Keys * Scales of justice * Gavels * Dollar signs * Charts * Document icons * Hands holding objects About the Brand: YWYW is a modern digital platform helping individuals and families plan, protect, organize, and preserve their future. candidates.title: Design Luxurious Financial Logo - EagleX
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: # Logo Design Brief – EagleX Financial Services ## Company Name **EagleX Financial Services** ## Industry Financial Services / Banking Distribution / DSA (Direct Sales Agency) ## Location Dubai, United Arab Emirates ## About the Company EagleX Financial Services is a Dubai-based financial services company specializing in banking product distribution and financial advisory solutions. The company assists individuals and businesses in obtaining financial products such as: * Personal Loans * Credit Cards * Business Loans * Mortgage Loans * Auto Loans * Banking Solutions * SME Financing The company acts as a trusted intermediary between customers and leading UAE banks, helping clients choose the most suitable financial products while ensuring a smooth and professional application process. --- ## Brand Vision To become one of the most trusted and respected financial distribution companies in t
